description_long: This is a single bed with a simple, modern design, featuring a rectangular blue platform frame and a white mattress on top. The bed has a low profile, with the mattress sitting flush against the frame, and a single white pillow positioned at one end. The frame appears to be solid and boxy, with a small rectangular cutout on one end, possibly for handling or ventilation. The bedding consists of a fitted white sheet that covers the mattress smoothly, with no visible wrinkles or additional blankets. The overall appearance is clean and minimalistic, suitable for urban environments such as dormitories, hostels, or temporary shelters. The materials suggest a combination of wood or engineered wood for the frame and fabric for the mattress and pillow.
description: A modern single bed with a blue platform frame and a white mattress, topped with a pillow and fitted sheet. The design is minimalistic and functional, with a small cutout on one end of the frame.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the blue frame, white mattress, and pillow at the left end.
description_view_1: End view highlighting the rectangular cutout in the blue frame and the width of the white mattress.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with the pillow now on the right, showing the same blue frame and white mattress.
description_view_3: End view without a cutout, showing the plain blue frame and the width of the mattress.
